幸好觉醒了最强挂机系统，只要挂机就能变强。
修炼？争霸？成为绝世强者？不存在的！
只想勾栏听曲、收集美女的秦风，为了更好的摆烂，一心想把自己的父亲秦武阳打造成绝世强者!
”那天我看到一个纨绔子弟在欺负一位绝世美女，想我天赋绝世，百年入圣，这个逼我能让他给装了？很快啊！啪的一下，他爹上来就给了我一个大逼兜子，当时我害怕极了！“
秦风：”我有一爹可搬山、倒海、降妖、镇魔、敕神.......！
就问你怕不怕？
不怕
我还有一妈，她脑子里整天想的就是：削他！盘他！整死他！
还不怕？
我还有两个姐姐！你家在哪里，指个方向吧！
算了还是让我哥来吧！
我爹刚给我认的，异父异母的亲哥哥。
对！就是一剑断万古的那个！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9eb11471179e8b48b1a59da883dc5f07","author":"冷无梦","author_id":"","book_id":"7185084340525599781","book_name":"爹自强，我摆烂，大帝见我都肝颤","book_short_name":"我的大帝父亲","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9615人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7185084424608809529","read_count":"9615","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1171533"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"556","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,东方玄幻,无脑爽,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/70e1863b2b20004c25796c690d4b63f3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391847&x-signature=KLftMpOGnnyeYsq9hEuQRNYQBPw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_i
